programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven

programme.title: Frasier: Where There's Smoke There's Fired

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Loves Roz
programme.desc: When Roz decides to date one of Niles' patients, Frasier tries to find a way to warn Roz without breaching his ethical obligation for confidentiality. Roz soon mistakes his attempts to warn her for subtle declarations of yearning.

programme.title: Frasier: The Focus Group
programme.desc: Frasier is puzzled when a single member of a focus group dislikes his radio show. Frasier's quest to understand why becomes an obsession and he inadvertently ruins the man's life.

programme.title: Frasier: You Can Go Home Again

programme.title: Frasier: The Two Mrs. Cranes

programme.desc: Roz sets Frasier up with a gorgeous woman, who takes a shine to Bulldog instead. But when she dumps him, Bulldog becomes so distraught that Frasier has to take over his show. Meanwhile, Niles places an ad to attract more patients.

programme.title: Frasier: The Impossible Dream
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles struggle to interpret Frasier's recurring dream, in which Frasier finds himself in bed with the radio station's restaurant critic.

programme.title: Frasier: A Crane's Critique

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Goodbye, Mr. Gordon

programme.desc: Dorothy desperately schemes to become a contestant on the game show Jeopardy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: An ancient family curse requires Sophia to save Dorothy by performing strange tasks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: The full moon and festivities prompt strange happenings including Blanche's jewelry being swiped, Sophia trying to break a curse, and Dorothy and Miles sharing a passionate kiss.

programme.title: Movie: I Am Watching You
programme.desc: When romance blogger Nora seeks inspiration for her book by having a passionate fling with her sexy next door neighbour, her 'no strings attached' relationship quickly spirals into a dangerous obsession.

programme.title: Movie: Seduced by My Neighbor
programme.desc: A woman finds herself the target of an obsessive neighbourhood watchman who aims to prove he's the best man to protect her, even if he has to create the danger himself.

programme.title: Movie: The Bachelor Next Door
programme.desc: A new neighbour wreaks havoc in the lives of a young, newly engaged couple.

programme.title: Movie: Hometown Killer
programme.desc: A woman finds her life in danger when she reconnects with an old high school friend who is now a police officer. The cop, still damaged from the bullying she experienced in high school, is bent on revenge.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Final Days of Whitney Houston
programme.desc: New details surrounding Whitney Houston's last days and her tumultuous relationship with Bobby Brown are revealed.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Prince: The End
programme.desc: Uncovering the secret struggles the music genius faced, from Prince's early years to the final days leading up to his shocking death.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: George Michael's Final Days
programme.desc: George Michael's life as international super star came to a mysterious and tragic end on Christmas Eve 2016. Family and fans were shocked by his sudden death. What happened the night he died?

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Gianni Versace Murder
programme.desc: Celebrity designer Gianni Versace was fatally shot on the steps of his Miami Beach mansion in broad daylight. The mystery of his death is unraveled by those closest to him and his killer Andrew Cunanan.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: JFK Jr's Final Flight
programme.desc: Examining the factors that led to the crash that killed John F. Kennedy Jr. and a never before seen interview with a person who may have been the last person to speak to JFK Jr, moments before the crash.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.desc: We analyze the reasons for the raid of a bizarre religious compound in Waco, Texas in 1993, and look at what was happening inside the Branch Davidian compound.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Waco: End of Days (Part 2)
programme.desc: The siege at Waco ended in a fiery battle that killed David Koresh, his followers, and his multiple wives and children. TV news crews and demonstrators watched in horror as the ranch went up in flames.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: Hundreds of people vanished without a trace in the mid 1970s, leaving their families was distraught and wondering about them for decades. In March 1997, shocking news of a mysterious religious group made world headlines.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Who Killed JonBenet Ramsey
programme.desc: Investigating a wide range of suspects and evidence in the killing of JonBenet, including the Ramsey's maid, and the man who portrayed Santa Claus at a holiday party, only days before JonBenet was found murdered.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: How It All Pans Out
programme.desc: In the midst of the season-ending storm, Emily plays chicken with Mother Nature, but may lose her diver in the process. Ken pushes the Myrtle to its max. Elaine proves herself to Vern by calling the shots.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Ice Mine Cometh
programme.desc: Winter has come along with the thinnest, most unpredictable ice in decades. After three years, Shawn returns to diving under the ice in pursuit of the Tomcod claim. Kris tries to set up and mine in one day. Emily's dependable Claim 14 shocks her.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Frozen Chokehold
programme.desc: With added scenes and facts: A regulator freeze-up cuts off Shawn's air supply just days into the winter mining season. Vernon returns to the ice aiming to buy Claim 16, while Emily negotiates with Mr. Gold for season-saving coordinates.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Snow Blind
programme.desc: The clock ticks as an impending, violent arctic storm the Siberian Express gathers strength. Shawn can't quit the gold. Kris gambles on another rookie miner. Emily finds gold but her equipment fails. Vernon risks everything to test Claim 16.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Entering Wild, Wild Country
programme.desc: Leaving comfortable lives behind, strangers journey to Alaska chasing dreams of an off-grid community. With only 100 days until winter, it's a race against nature. They immediately set off to hunt moose, but struggle against the elements and each other.

programme.title: Ed Stafford: First Man Out: Ed vs Matt Wright
programme.desc: Ed challenges Matt 'The Juggernaut' Wright in the Wanshan Archipelago off the coast of southern China. They race to secure islands that can provide materials to build rafts capable of a 25 km sea crossing.

programme.title: Ed Stafford: First Man Out: Borneo
programme.desc: Ed Stafford challenges ultra-fit ex-Marine and ropes expert Aldo Kane to race across the tangled wilds of Borneo's mangrove swamps.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Snow Blind
programme.desc: With added scenes and facts: A violent arctic storm approaches as Shawn struggles to quit the gold. Kris gambles on another rookie, Emily's equipment fails and Vernon risks it all.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flood, Sweat, and Tears: Part Two

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Treehouse of Terror
programme.desc: The Raneys tackle a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse in Missouri. Marty works to overhaul the entire base of the cabin. Misty constructs a greenhouse out of scavenged windows, and Matt builds a workshop for the Oglesbys' leather goods business.

programme.desc: After a devastating earthquake, Marty saves the Hartleys' log cabin from crumbling to the ground while Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse and Matt constructs a brand new building for the family to start a diesel engine repair shop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Troubled Water
programme.desc: The Raneys help an Oregon couple with a toxic salt water well, who are desperate for a viable water source. Marty needs clay to build a massive catchment pond and Matt must build a large scale solar still to de-contaminate the water.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Prom Edition

programme.title: True Life: Quarantine Stories: Stuck in a Crowded House
programme.desc: The pandemic has forced both senior NCAA basketball player, Jamiere, and expecting couple, Chris and Ameide, to move back in with their families. With major life moments like graduation and having a child, the pressure is only increased.

programme.title: True Life: Quarantine Stories: Love in the Time of Corona

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jasper and Errol
programme.desc: Jasper and Errol join Rob, Steelo and Chanel to see who 'can't feel the heat', get in time with some 'synchronized suckers', and greet some 'polite fighters'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: 100th

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ryan Sheckler
programme.desc: Skateboarding pro Ryan Sheckler joins Rob to look at some heated sibling rivalries and show us how to avoid skateboard missiles.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXXX

programme.title: American Greed: Scams, Scoundrels and Scandals: The Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: Ross Mandell, a brash New York stock broker once known as the 'Bad Boy of Wall Street' gets sober and re-invents himself as an international power player.

programme.title: American Greed: Scams, Scoundrels and Scandals: The Cash King
programme.desc: James 'The Cash King' Duncan sets his sights on strip clubs, real estate, Iraqi currency, diamonds and even mind control technology. His over-the-top lifestyle is a devious façade built with empty promises, and it costs investors millions.

programme.title: American Greed: Biggest Cons: Billionaire Boys Bust
programme.desc: John Bravata uses free lunch seminars to lure 440 middle class victims into his $50 million real estate investment scam. He is now serving 20 years, but his son may be plotting a crooked comeback.

programme.title: American Greed: Biggest Cons: The Most Hated Man in America?
programme.desc: Martin Shkreli jacked up the price of a life- saving drug and is in prison for defrauding investors. Now behind bars, he was found using a contraband cellphone, violating prison rules to allegedly run his company.

programme.title: American Greed: Scams, Scoundrels and Scandals: 'Vintage' Wine Fraud
programme.desc: Counterfeit wine dealer Rudy Kurniawan dominates the fine wine scene, making millions selling his cheap basement blends through elite auction houses.

programme.title: American Greed: Scams, Scoundrels and Scandals: The Dirtiest Con
programme.desc: Barry Minkow, just out of jail after serving seven years for turning his company into a $100 million scam, is committed to becoming a fraud fighter. His reform is questioned once it's learned his 'fraud institute' is a massive extortion plot.

programme.title: American Greed: Scams, Scoundrels and Scandals: The Playboy of Indiana
programme.desc: A multimillion-dollar yacht, 80 sports cars, a Playboy magazine model girlfriend. Tim Durham is the picture of success as a fix it and flip it business king. But in the comfort of his 12,000 square foot home he's running a $200 million fraud.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid Noir/ ScavengerPants
programme.desc: When his clarinet goes missing, Squidward must become a hardboiled detective to track it down. Squidward sends SpongeBob and Patrick on an increasingly difficult scavenger hunt to get them out of his hair.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: Continental Drift
programme.desc: Three friends go on an adventure after their continent floats away. Using an iceberg as a boat, they face many challenges as they discover a new land they have never seen before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Movie: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Three couples agree to vacation at an island resort while their friends are there to work on their marriage. Once all of the couples arrive on the remote island, they learn that marriage counselling is mandatory for all of them and they cannot leave.

programme.title: Movie: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Three couples agree to vacation at an island resort while their friends are there to work on their marriage. Once all of the couples arrive on the remote island, they learn that marriage counselling is mandatory for all of them and they cannot leave.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Keep Your Friends Close and Your Bucket Closer
programme.desc: A contestant is dragged into the Pepperdome by his cousin and focuses more on his stomach than the questions. Plus, two BFFs that think they're immune to the spice quickly get with the heat.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Grandmas Get Sauced
programme.desc: Grandmas with a serious drive to compete enter the Pepperdome to take on a pair of buddies who seem to have tongues of steel.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 4
programme.desc: The Smoking Gun presents 20 of the World's Dumbest Partiers. Danny Bonaduce, Todd Bridges and the rest of the celebrity cast comment on impaired dart throwers in an English pub and binge-drinking buffoons in Canada.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 5
programme.desc: Be a witness to 20 all-new party moments that you have to see to believe! Grandma's doing keg stands, karaoke singers unable to sing their ABCs, and Aussies shooting fireworks from down under are just a few of the wild moments in this episode.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 6
programme.desc: A naked john runs after the prostitute who stole all his clothes, with memories that will linger after the hangover has passed.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 7
programme.desc: In an ongoing mission to bring bad behavior to light, The Smoking Gun presents 20 of the World's Dumbest Partiers. This week, an upside-down drinking contest leaves everyone doused with beer. Meanwhile, a drunk Russian woman does an impromptu strip tease.

programme.title: Movie: Night at the Museum: Secret of the Tomb
programme.desc: A museum security guard travels to London to figure out how to save the fading magic that brings the historical figures of the museum to life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Hot Sauce Conquers All
programme.desc: A pair of former baristas compete against two wine-loving buddies. It soon becomes clear that pinot and caffeine have nothing on peppers and capsaicin.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Steve Austin
programme.desc: Stone Cold Steve Austin may be a six-time WWF World Heavyweight Champion and WWE Hall of Famer, but spicy food might make him meet his match.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 9
programme.desc: Featuring a man so drunk and lazy he urinates in his own bed, and then climbs in and goes to sleep. Meanwhile, a group of intoxicated college students snowboard down a flight of stairs.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 12
programme.desc: A groom faints at his own wedding, a music festival attendee mistakes a urinal for a sink, and a Russian sunbather mistakes his pants for his shirt.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Running With Scissors

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: The Fieri Family Watch Party
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and family cozy up to take a look back at the first pilot episode. This cross-country drive down memory lane includes a nine-seat counter in New Jersey and a 1950s-style diner in Boston cranking out their own corned beef hash.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast, West Coast
programme.desc: Guy visits a California joint to try spicy pork and knockout gnocchi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burger and Breakfast
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from breakfast to burgers. In Vancouver, British Columbia, a pie shop bakin' up both sweet and savory sensations. In Chico, California, a morning hot spot pumping up French toast and spicing up potatoes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Between The Bread
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's always down for a good sandwich, so he's stopping in to check out some of the Triple D Nation's latest creations. A food truck in Nashville put down roots and started churning out cheesy concoctions.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Brisket to Bison
programme.desc: It's all about the meat as Guy Fieri crosses the country to stop at some of his favorite haunts. In Denver, a Native American eatery has a new way to serve bison, and a Nashville diner is taking lamb to the next level. Plus, Guy snoops around Yellowstone.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Stuffed Stuff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows it's what's on the inside that counts and these top spots in the Triple D Nation really know how to stuff the good stuff in. Like in Eureka, Calif., where a chef is cramming calamari with shrimp and leeks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Italian, Hawaiian and Colombian
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a multicultural flavour fest. In Hawaii, a poke place is knocking it out of the park with their island specialties. In San Carlos, California, a crazy Italian spot putting tasty twists on their homemade pasta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Filling Up on Philly
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is filling up on a taste of Philadelphia. There's a funky malt house serving Buffalo wings and a Polish twist on the cheesesteak. Plus, a long time tavern making real deal Italian recipes and a stop for Indonesian specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Culinary Journey
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road for on an off-the-chain culinary journey. On the Big Island, a Filipino-Hawaiian mashup making a name for leaving diners speechless.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Flavor Faves
programme.desc: Check out some of Guy's favourite spots serving up all kinds of traditional ethnic dishes including hand-pulled Chinese noodles from Peaceful Restaurant, to quesadillas and tortas at Nopalito, and Guamanian classics at PDX 671.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homegrown and Homemade
programme.desc: Guy hits a restaurant South Carolina that serves collard greens right off the farm.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Po' Boys, Pasta and Pork
programme.desc: Guy goes all over the country for comfort foods like Po-Boy sandwiches, pulled pork sandwiches and a favoured bbq joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Filling Up on Philly
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is filling up on a taste of Philadelphia. There's a funky malt house serving Buffalo wings and a Polish twist on the cheesesteak. Plus, a long time tavern making real deal Italian recipes and a stop for Indonesian specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Name That Cook
programme.desc: Guy checks out three local namesake favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Spectacular
programme.desc: Guy is celebrating southern home cooking from collards and grits in South Carolina to homemade biscuits in Oregon.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homestyle
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Seattle that are serving homestyle cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Classics
programme.desc: Guy explores classics from coast-to-coast; he starts in Portland and ends in Texas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Upper Crust
programme.desc: Guy visits a hoagie shop in Hollywood with home made rolls and a café in Portland, Oregon.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Funky Finds
programme.desc: Guy discovers some hidden gems like a fish shack that flies in the fish, and a volunteer-run brunch spot where kids do the cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unconventional Comforts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to the east coast of Oahu and visits a general store serving traditional Hawaiian dishes. In Chicago, an Italian family is serving sandwiches made from scratch, and in Hernando, an underground cafe serving French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast Comfort
programme.desc: Guy is making stops up and down the east coast for some home cooking. He checks out a Southern comfort join in Cambridge, Mass., pierogi in Fall River, and meatballs and fries in Providence.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Vive La Din Din
programme.desc: Rachael Ray proves that rich and creamy chicken can be prepared in less than 30 minutes - and with only a handful of ingredients. She makes a Dijon-tarragon chicken, mashed potatoes with brie or camembert and rainbow chard with bacon and leeks.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Take Me Out to the Ball Game
programme.desc: Valerie's always been a football fan, but today Valerie's longtime friend, Lisa, and her husband, former baseball player Billy Ashley, are going to show Valerie how much fun baseball culture can be.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Smokin' Hot Flavors
programme.desc: The Kitchen is all fired up for grilling season with smokin' hot new flavours, starting with Jeff's pastrami-rubbed smoked tri-tip. Sunny whips up easy hush puppies with hot honey dipping sauce and Katie Lee makes a grilled romaine salad.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Biscuit Lovin'
programme.desc: The Nashville restaurant scene has exploded, and one of the town's favorites is a place called Biscuit Love. Trisha Yearwood takes her sister, Beth, to sample some of their most popular dishes. Then, they give those flavors a twist at home.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Generational Goodies
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's mom comes to the farm to share a few family recipes before baby arrives. Molly makes pastrami eggrolls as a tribute to her mother's hometown to go with citrus chicken rice bowls and grilled veggies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 12
programme.desc: Ladd drops by on Ree and the kids to see what's cooking. The Greek salad is roasted and her sesame noodles with mushrooms are stir-fried. Plus, Ree makes breaded buffalo fried mozzarella bites and creates a 'King of the Ranch' ice cream pie.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Comfort
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is speeding things up by giving her favorite comfort food recipes the 16-minute treatment, including chicken pot pie and shrimp and grits.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Comfort Food
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts share the comfort food recipes that make them happy all summer long. Sunny Anderson has a spin on a favourite with citrus glazed can-grilled chicken.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Pizza and a Movie
programme.desc: Trisha invites the guys over for pizza and a movie. She makes malted milk fudge and a seven-layer dip. Then she teaches her cowboy tour manager how to make a basil pesto pizza.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like A Pro: Salads For Four Seasons
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing her pro tips for sensational salads for every season. For an all-in-one spring dinner, her crispy mustard chicken and frisee salad is unbeatable, and tarragon shrimp salad is perfect for an easy and delicious summer lunch.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Twin It to Win It
programme.desc: Three pairs of twins team up to show that two head chefs are better than one at winning up to $20,000 in Flavortown!

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Clash of the Vegetarians!
programme.desc: When four veggie masters compete in three veggie-inspired rounds, they prove that leafy greens and nutrient-packed beans have more protein than meets the eye.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: One Shop Showdown
programme.desc: Four thrifty chefs must make a comfort food classic breakfast, a spicy lunch and a fried dinner without returning to the market for more supplies.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Trivia Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes wild combining his brand of food trivia with his favorite culinary games. The four competitors are out to prove that they're great chefs who also know a lot about food.

programme.desc: Chris unearths a whirlwind wedding ceremony, some exploding rocks and a woman's twin inside her brain.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Host Chris Packham reveals how deadly poisonous frogs can saves lives, why we see faces in everything and how one woman's pants spontaneously burst into flame.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Chris Packham explores the mysteries behind a glacier that bleeds red, finds out how an electrician got tattooed by a lightning bolt and uncovers the remarkable story of a man with a tooth for an eye.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Chris discovers the secrets behind a flame-filled firenado, unearths a very bizarre looking living rock and meets a team of oversized rats who save lives.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Host Chris Packham uncovers the cause of some mysterious holes in the Russian tundra, finds an underwater lake and meets the creator of a canon built especially for salmon.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Young Blood
programme.desc: It’s a fight for survival for a newborn in the wild, from the very first breath. To make it to a full grown adult, they have to learn and perfect their own strategies to outwit and maneuver from the dangers they face.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Giant Killers
programme.desc: Long after the age of dinosaurs, giants still roam this planet. Engineered to withstand the test of time, these animals have super-sized bodies, thick skin, sharp teeth and bad attitudes.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Cat Attack
programme.desc: In Africa, big cats clawed their way to the top of the food chain. Every hunt is a deadly execution of power, stealth and speed. In the quiet of the night, no prey will hear them coming. Beware of getting stalked by Africa’s deadliest cats.

programme.desc: The birthplace of America's frontier characters and inspiration for stories about our nation's storied past, the 'Great Valley' remains a unique landscape that is home to some of the world's most unique critters.

programme.title: America's Wild Frontier: The Mighty Mississippi
programme.desc: Discover the wildlife around North America's greatest flow of water.

programme.title: Wild Mississippi: Raging Waters
programme.desc: Spring is in bloom, and all the snow and ice from across the watershed is melting, triggering a massive flood of biblical proportions. We'll see how the inhabitants adjust and fight to survive.

programme.title: Wild Mississippi: Deep Freeze
programme.desc: Nat Geo WILD travels to the starting point of the mighty Mississippi River: Lake Itasca in Minnesota, where the 2,350-mile journey to the Gulf of Mexico begins.

programme.title: Wild Mississippi: Delta Blues
programme.desc: Our romance with the Mississippi River heats up as we head south. The river joins with an even more flooded Ohio River to form a union of destruction that challenges man and wildlife.

programme.desc: Matt helps a blue heeler with violent reactions to strangers and a street dog with a negative reaction to collars.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Search for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Mysterious evidence on Mt. Ararat could be the long-lost remains of Noah's Ark, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate if these discoveries are hard proof of the Biblical legend.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Pyramid Code
programme.desc: Ancient pyramids are among the greatest wonders of the world and exist across many civilizations. Explore the origins of these structures as experts question if they were independently constructed or perhaps the design of something more mysterious.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Illuminati
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the mysterious group known as 'The Illuminati,' and where they operate from. Find out if they are really some secret world government operating in the shadows, or if they're just one huge conspiracy.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Holy Grail
programme.desc: Find out what The Holy Grail could have been, whether it was a cup from the Last Supper or used to cleanse Jesus’ body after the Crucifixion, and see where it could be today.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge investigations at the Bermuda Triangle might confirm the newest theories of what really goes on in this deadly stretch of water. What experts find points to something stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Ark of the Convenant
programme.desc: The Biblical mystery of the whereabouts of the Ark of the Covenant is unravelled on a quest across continents. Believed to be the throne of God himself, the search for the Ark leads us to where many are convinced is its current resting place, Ethiopia.

programme.title: Diabolical: Queen of Deception
programme.desc: 2011 is off to a rocky start when a beloved Susanville police officer is found dead. What first looks like suicide morphs into a full blown murder investigation when his wife becomes a suspect and detectives uncover a story of love, lust and murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Murders
programme.desc: Pennsylvania native Janet Lynn Mickey's greatest dream is to start her own family. So, when she marries college football-star Darrell Tyburski her future seems secure. But when the young couple has children, they are led down the darkest path.

programme.title: Diabolical: Best of Friends
programme.desc: After sneaking out of his parent's Garden Grove, CA house for a secret late-night party, 19-year-old Jose Najera returns home to find both parents dead on their bedroom floor. Is it a random killing or a robbery gone wrong? The truth is more diabolical.

programme.title: See No Evil: Lock Up
programme.desc: When Marcel Reardon is discovered bludgeoned to death outside an apartment building, his friends deny all knowledge of his murder. But detectives are convinced at least one of them is lying. As the net closes, the prime suspect prepares to strike again.

programme.title: See No Evil: It Looks Like You
programme.desc: A quiet town is shaken to its core when an innocent woman is gunned down in broad daylight. Detectives desperately act to find her killer and restore the peace. With a murderer on the loose, can video surveillance uncover what lies beneath?

programme.title: See No Evil: It Came Back
programme.desc: When a young mother of two is found brutally murdered at home, suspicion falls on her friends. Detectives zero in on multiple suspects but as each one tells a different story; they don't know who to trust. Surveillance footage may reveal the truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Landlady
programme.desc: The brutal murder of an elderly landlady offers no forensic answers. Detectives piece together security footage, and a motive to find their killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Call Me Back, Chris
programme.desc: In February 2008, Christopher Duncan left his apartment in San Antonio Texas, never to return again. Police have little to go on until surveillance footage has the potential to reveal the identity of a dangerous killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: A father-to-be is shot while out for a morning walk, leaving his wife a widow. Security footage from the scene reveals his final, shocking moments.

programme.title: See No Evil: Driven to the Edge
programme.desc: After dropping her two boys at school in Coral Springs, Florida, Surya Toha vanishes without a trace. Her husband is devastated and detectives have few clues to work with... until chilling CCTV footage reveals exactly what happened to her.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Doctor Will See You
programme.desc: Devoted family man Dr. David Cornbleet is brutally killed in his office. His daughter finds him, bound and gagged, in a pool of blood. Police must rely on CCTV images of man with a concealed face to lead them to David's killer in this twisted tale.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Sex and the Married Man
programme.desc: A married man embarks on a forbidden relationship with his 14-year-old babysitter. When his wife finds out, he will stop at nothing to keep his affair secret from the police.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Good Deed Punished
programme.desc: A Christian couple open up their home to a young woman in need of a helping hand. But their act of charity has unexpected consequences when emotional support gives way to physical attraction and a lustful affair turns deadly.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Onward, Christian Soldier
programme.desc: While her husband serves in the army, a lonely married mother of three finds comfort in the arms of her church's charismatic new minister. But danger looms in the form of a jealous love-rival that will stop at nothing to scare her away.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: A teen girl forbidden from dating falls hard for an older man. In a desperate bid to be with him, she runs away from home. But young love soon turns to fatal obsession.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Hell's Angel
programme.desc: When lonely teen Meagan Grunwald meets handsome 26-year-old felon Angel Garcia, it's love at first sight. But their whirlwind romance spirals into a hurricane of passion that leaves innocence destroyed and a trail of death and devastation in its path.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: Mission: Proof
programme.desc: Lizzie Welsh, the youngest of a tight-knit family, is killed in a tragic trucking accident, leaving behind her young son Conner. Now Lizzie's brother-in-law Gary believes her death was no accident, and that Conner may be next to die.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: A Fire Inside
programme.desc: When a serial arsonist murders four people in a California hardware store, fire investigators Marvin Casey and John Orr both become obsessed with the case. As fires continue to burn across the state, the two are pushed to their limits to stop the killing.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: The Devils Allure
programme.desc: Lonely widow Marilyn Burdick finally finds love again with Louis Plunkett, a charming real-estate agent. But Marilyn's only daughter Karen and her husband Jason doubt Louis' motivations and tension quickly escalates, triggering a deadly series of events.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: On March 21st 2011, a fire burned down a parsonage behind a church and a Pastor loses his wife. Once the fire had settled a fire marshal investigated the site and discovered that there was more to the story than an accidental fire.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Wheeling and Dealing
programme.desc: Feb. 24, 1996, Frank Black Jr., the owner of a school bus company, goes missing. The FBI needs to determine if he is dead, and where's his body? It's a mystery built on lies that can only be solved when someone is brave enough, to tell the truth.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Letters in the Closet
programme.desc: Karla leaves her home one night and never returns. The next day, her husband calls the police to file a missing person report. When the police uncover a treasure trove of hidden secrets, they have to decide who is telling the truth and who is lying.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Before Vegas
programme.desc: August 7, 2000, Casey Tiner and her boyfriend TJ Steele disappear. At first, people believe they ran away. But as time passes and the young couple never reappear, their families and the police realize someone is lying.

programme.title: Betrayed: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Ray Kotomski, a retired corrections officer, thinks he's survived the most risky years of his life… but dealing with his second wife, her hostile brother, jealous ex-husband, and deranged stalker proves far more dangerous – and deadly.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be MacGyver
programme.desc: Serving life for a double homicide, Harold Laird breaks out of prison with great creativity. On the lam, he evades the law in a series of near misses. Exhausted, Laird finally passes out in a stolen truck. When a cop notices, he quickly calls for backup.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Underground
programme.desc: Toby Young escaped to Mexico through drug tunnels and learned the true cost of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pretend I'm a Priest
programme.desc: Con artist Fred Brito reinvented himself dozens of times and conducted a symphony orchestra, was elected to a public office, and administered mass as a fake catholic priest.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: After getting arrested for robbery, Robert Askew runs from a work camp and goes back to stealing to make a living. Askew eventually gets caught again, but he escapes from jail during a hurricane and goes on a crime spree, breaking into vacation homes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape in Underwear
programme.desc: Ricky McCurry has been in and out of prison his whole life, escaping by tricking and bribing guards. On the outside, McCurry runs into bad luck with botched robberies and high-speed chases.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pretend I'm a Priest
programme.desc: Con artist Fred Brito reinvented himself dozens of times and conducted a symphony orchestra, was elected to a public office, and administered mass as a fake catholic priest.

programme.desc: After getting arrested for robbery, Robert Askew runs from a work camp and goes back to stealing to make a living. Askew eventually gets caught again, but he escapes from jail during a hurricane and goes on a crime spree, breaking into vacation homes.

programme.desc: Ricky McCurry has been in and out of prison his whole life, escaping by tricking and bribing guards. On the outside, McCurry runs into bad luck with botched robberies and high-speed chases.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Underground
programme.desc: Toby Young escaped to Mexico through drug tunnels and learned the true cost of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be MacGyver
programme.desc: Serving life for a double homicide, Harold Laird breaks out of prison with great creativity. On the lam, he evades the law in a series of near misses. Exhausted, Laird finally passes out in a stolen truck. When a cop notices, he quickly calls for backup.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Denim & Co.
programme.desc: Classic, current and affordable women's separates.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Broken to Beautiful
programme.desc: After living with a broken pool for four years, a family decides to build their dream pool again. Brian and Paul Porter give them an out-of-this-world creation, featuring a waterfall wall, sunken fire pit and poolside spa.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Pirate Treasure Pool
programme.desc: Kelly Caviness and his team build two spectacular pools. The first is a modern, kid-friendly retreat for Mike, Lisa and their two children. The other pool is an epic pirate-themed water park complete with a hidden treasure room and animatronic pirates.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool for a Dream Home
programme.desc: The kings create a resort in a family's backyard that includes a waterfall grotto with a slide and infinity edge. Additional elements include a splash pad and sun shelf, transforming the yard from barren to beautiful.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Flawed to Flawless
programme.desc: A Franklin, TN, couple enlists the Pool Kings to build their dream pool in their very challenging backyard.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Build the Pool and They Will Come
programme.desc: Grandparents want an irresistible pool to ensure the grandkids will want to spend plenty of time at their new place. Steve and Justin come through with a beautiful raised pool design featuring a huge deck that triples the entertaining space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Vegas Jackpot Swimming Pool
programme.desc: A Las Vegas family hits the jackpot when Paul and Brian come to design the pool of their dreams. The guys are put to the test to turn the narrow desert yard into a world of water that includes splash pads, an outdoor kitchen and a pro volleyball net.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Canyon Country Playground
programme.desc: A big family on a large property wants to replace their old patio and pool with an updated design. Mike and Jim deliver on the dream by transforming the yard into a canyon country playground. The backyard oasis includes a lazy river and a cave.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Desert Oasis in Sin City
programme.desc: Mike Baldasare and Jim Bellamy, two best friends that build award winning pools for clients all across the southwest, head to Las Vegas to build a dream pool for Shane and Willow Jager's brand new dream home.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' Pools
programme.desc: Lucas Congdon and his team at Lucas Lagoons build custom pools and gardens.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Backyard or Water Park?
programme.desc: Why go on vacation when you have your own resort-worthy pool right in your own backyard?

programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Lone Star State, where they're taking open-fire cooking to new culinary heights with unique rigs. In Fort Worth, Texas, chef and restaurateur Lou Lambert invites Roger to his ranch to slow-roast whole hogs over oak coals.

programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets up with a few culinary titans in Tennessee who are swinging for the fences with outrageous rigs. At Wedge Oak Farm in Lebanon, Tenn., he joins Chef Trey Cioccia, owner of Nashville's Black Rabbit, to set up the Burn Tower.

programme.title: The Loud House: Future Tense/ Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family, they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Big One
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward and Mr. Krabs are swept away by a giant wave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Krushers/ The Card
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandpappy the Pirate/ Cephalopod Lodge
programme.desc: With SpongeBob's help, Mr. Krab attempts to fool his granddad into thinking he's a pirate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shuffleboarding/ Prefessor Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubblestand/ Ripped Pants
programme.desc: The art of bubble blowing; Bob rips his pants at Mussel Beach.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Selling Out/ Funny Pants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sells his restaurant to a big company, but he soon finds retirement boring.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pink Purloiner/ Squid Wood
programme.desc: Rejected by Squidward, SpongeBob decides to make his own Squid ventriloquist dummy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patty Caper/ Plankton's Regular
programme.desc: The secret ingredient in the Krabby Patty is stolen; the Chum Bucket gets a new customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Banned in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob loves Krabby Patties so much, he just can't help singing and dancing when he's around the delicious sandwiches.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula
programme.desc: Plankton is in jail and plans to break out with the help of his fellow inmates. SpongeBob's spatula breaks so he replaces it with one of Plankton's.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fear of a Krabby Patty/ Shell of a Man
programme.desc: SpongeBob develops a fear of Krabby Patties; Mr. Krab molts his shell before a reunion.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Mrs. Puff, You're Fired
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for as long as anyone can remember, but Mr. Krabs explains that this wasn't always the case. Flashbacks reveal how their friendship went sour.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Boating Buddies/ Krabby Kronicle
programme.desc: Squidward is forced to attend Boating School with SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtles in Time
programme.desc: The Turtles get whisked through time by apprentice Time Master Renet, and they must all work together to defeat the evil Time Master Savanti Romero.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tale of the Yokai
programme.desc: The Turtles are accidentally transported to the past where they cross paths with a familiar ninja clan.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Attack of the Mega Shredder!
programme.desc: Leo decides to sneak into Shredder's Lair alone only to face the biggest mutant threat yet.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Creeping Doom
programme.desc: After an accident, Donnie finds himself slowly losing his intelligence.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Fourfold Trap
programme.desc: The Turtles are baited by an unknown enemy into deadly traps.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Dinosaur Seen in Sewers!
programme.desc: When Raph makes a new friend in Zog, an alien Triceraton, he may have bitten off more than he can chew.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Midden Fleasure/ Tread or Alive
programme.desc: Fendrich and his gang learn of Cluster's hidden junkyard treasure. Harl Cluster, Shirley and Tread unite to protect it. Snake and Daisy take advantage of Tread to get him to act as their getaway driver to pull off a heist.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: The Quacken/ The Treasure of Nosepatch
programme.desc: When the mythical ocean monster, the Quacken, is sighted off the coast, famed adventurer Jessica Sharpe vows to capture it. Rooky and Grizzled go undercover aboard the Guardian of the Oceans in search of a lost pirate treasure.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Suck Toad/ Secret Admirer
programme.desc: Brittany is preparing a class speech on 'inner beauty' when an endangered species makes its home on her face. Alvin believes that Kevin has a secret crush on one of the Chipettes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Karate Kidder/ Playing Favorites
programme.desc: Dave, Simon and Theodore are worried for Alvin's safety after Alvin enters a karate contest. Later, when Alvin suspects Simon is Dave's favorite, he and Theo challenge Simon to a go-cart race to win Dave's favor.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Un-send!/ The Orb
programme.desc: Simon accidentally sends an email venting about a professor and the boys must keep the teacher from reading it! Theodore has a hard time saying no and trouble ensues when Alvin needs Theodore to say yes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to Basics/ Report Cards
programme.desc: Everyone thinks Simon has lost his mind after he fails a school test and moves into a tree for some alone time. Alvin worries about his bad report card and does everything he can to intercept the mail before Dave sees it.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Flabber Gassed
programme.desc: After acting too confident before a fight, Kid Danger and Captain Man are sprayed with Flabber Gas, making them powerless to defeat a new villain in Swellview. Schwoz puts our heroes in Exo-Suits which Charlotte and Jasper control.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Back to the Danger
programme.desc: Piper is taken by a creature from another dimension. Captain Man and Kid Danger must rescue her from the Evil Science Corporation that opened the portal.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry's Birthday
programme.desc: While trying to celebrate his birthday, Henry keeps getting interrupted by crimes going on in Swellview.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Whistlin' Susie
programme.desc: After activating an atomic bomb in the 'Man Cave,' Ray and Henry decide to drive it out into the Swellview desert in order to save the city that they protect.

programme.title: The Thundermans: The Girl with the Dragon Snafu
programme.desc: Phoebe joins the 'cool' group for a class project, only to find that they do not want to work as hard as she does. Max takes Phoebe's usual spot in her friends' group, and tries to coast by letting them do all the work.

programme.title: The Thundermans: On the Straight and Arrow
programme.desc: Cherry asks Max to use his superpowers to help her get her driver's license, but Phoebe's jealously of their new bond threatens her relationship with her best friend.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Phoebe vs. Max: The Sequel
programme.desc: Phoebe's first assignment as a superhero is to protect Hiddenville, which proves too easy until she challenges Max to inject some mischief into their sleepy hometown.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Why You Buggin'?
programme.desc: After discovering that Link's ex-girlfriend is a secret supervillain who wants Link for herself, Phoebe enlists Max's help in exposing her rival's true motives.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Snooze Pods/ Sticky Vicky
programme.desc: Jasper becomes trapped in a dream using one of Schwoz's Snooze Pods. Henry's field trip to the Museum of Celebrity Garbage is cut short by the arrival of Sticky Vicky.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Tiny Toddler/ Magical Beefery Tour
programme.desc: After misplacing the shrink ray, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to battle The Toddler to win it back. Captain man and Kid Danger find a golden pickle in their burger which wins them a private tour of the secretive factory where Beefo's Burgers are made.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 must continue to fight off a city overrun with monsters.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Rebirth! Master Devolos!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: No Stone Unturned!
programme.desc: A chance meeting with another Trainer gives Ash and Rowlet new battle experiences.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Parade Day/ DIY Guys
programme.desc: Cricket leaves Gloria to work the coffee shop alone while he enjoys the parade on his break.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.title: Marty & McGee
programme.desc: Popular radio personalities Marty and McGee meet at the crossroads of southern culture and college football.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Birmingham
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hotdog stands to steakhouses. Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant. This is what the future looks like.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Athens
programme.desc: Pablo Rivadeneyra rotisserie-cooks lime-marinated chicken in Norwood. Across the street at Scott's BBQ, Larry and Betty Jean Scott work a smoke-belching pit. In these two places, we get a glimpse of the hard work that defines life in the south.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Nashville
programme.desc: One meat and three vegetables is the formula for a typical farmhand meal, translated in the mid-twentieth century to steam table cafes. In Nashville, the differences between Black and White cooking come into focus, and we discover that there are few.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Shreveport
programme.desc: Shreveport emerged in the mid-1800s as a lumber boomtown on the Red River. Cycles of boom and bust has defined this town. Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wok-fried T-bones and pork egg foo young.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A registered nurse turned entrepreneur from Carlsbad, California, helps breastfeeding moms find a healthy and convenient way to increase their milk supply with her delicious food item.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Escape Room
programme.desc: Kid Danger and Captain get trapped inside an escape room with two new kids who are strangely good and solving the puzzles.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Game of Phones
programme.desc: When a young girl chains herself outside of Junk-N-Stuff, Kid Danger and Captain Man are forced to help find her beloved phone. While on a stakeout, they unexpectedly run across some familiar faces with a devious plan they weren't prepared for.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Beginning of the End

programme.title: Henry Danger: Captain Drex

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Fate of Danger: Part I

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Fate of Danger: Part II

programme.title: Danger Force: Leaked Video
programme.desc: Captain Man is on the hunt to figure out which member of Danger Force leaked an embarrassing video of him online. If no one confesses, Captain Man is prepared to get revenge on all of them as punishment.

programme.title: Danger Force: The Danger Force Awakens
programme.desc: Captain Man has a new crew of superhero sidekicks, Danger Force, but when he tells them there's a 'crime drought' in Swellview, they begin to suspect that he's fighting crime without them.

programme.title: Danger Force: Say My Name
programme.desc: The members of Danger Force are given terrible nicknames live on KLVY news, so they come up with a plan to announce to the world who they really are - Volt, AWOL, ShoutOut, and Brainstorm.

programme.title: Danger Force: Leaked Video
programme.desc: Captain Man is on the hunt to figure out which member of Danger Force leaked an embarrassing video of him online. If no one confesses, Captain Man is prepared to get revenge on all of them as punishment.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Enemy In-Law
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs' Mom is dating again, and it seems like things could be serious, so Krabs tries to be happy for his mother.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pineapple Fever/ Chum Caverns
programme.desc: Squidward gets stuck indoors with SpongeBob and Patrick during a storm. Plankton creates an underground restaurant that threatens to put the Krusty Krab out of business.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Phoebe's Uterus
programme.desc: Phoebe is stunned when her brother asks her to become a surrogate mother for him.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Embryos
programme.desc: Phoebe tries to beat the odds to get pregnant so she can become a surrogate mother.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Crush
programme.desc: Rachel is demoted to a personal shopper but is comforted when she assists a cute customer.

programme.title: Friends: The One With All the Rugby
programme.desc: Ross agrees to play a game of rugby to impress Emily and her athletic English pals.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Fake Party
programme.desc: Rachel insists on throwing a farewell party for Emily just so she can invite Joshua.

programme.title: Mom: Black Mold and An Old Hot Dog
programme.desc: Christy helps Jill adjust to being a new foster mother and Bonnie has trouble convincing tenants that she's a good building manager.

programme.title: Mom: Tush Push and Some Radishes
programme.desc: Following the death of Bonnie's mother, Christy and Bonnie learn that she kept a very big secret.

programme.title: Mom: Tantric Sex and the Sprouted Flute
programme.desc: Christy annoys everyone when she adopts her new boyfriend Brad's healthy lifestyle, and Bonnie and Adam decide to take the next step in their relationship.

programme.title: Mom: A Cricket and a Hedge Made of Gold
programme.desc: When Marjorie takes a break from the group, Bonnie becomes the go-to for everyone's problems and Christy tries to overcome a painful memory from her past.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Gets Smoking Mad at Benny and Develops an Oral Fixation
programme.desc: When Power Aviation institutes a smoking ban, Benny's nicotine withdrawals drive George to self-destructive behaviour.

programme.title: George Lopez: George's Bogey-ous Relationship With Vic Is Putt to the Test
