programme.title: Full House: Back to School Blues
programme.desc: D.J. has a rough day at Junior High when she finds all the kids more grown-up than her.

programme.title: Full House: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do (in 22 Minutes)
programme.desc: Jesse and Rebecca have a fight; Michelle learns to skate; the tooth fairy visits.

programme.title: Full House: Nerd for a Day
programme.desc: Stephanie learns a lesson about teasing when she has to apologize for calling a boy names.

programme.title: Full House: Granny Tanner
programme.desc: Danny's mom is made to feel so welcome, that she decides to move in on a permanent basis.

programme.title: Full House: Star Search
programme.desc: Appearing on Star Search is Joey's last chance to become famous before his deadline.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Dogs / The Wreck of Mauna Loa
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to start selling hot dogs instead of Krabby Patties.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Free Samples / Home Sweet Rubble
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is forced to give out free Krabby Patties to win back customers after Plankton drives them away.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid on Strike/ Sandy, SpongeBob and the Worm
programme.desc: SpongeBob is petrified by a huge worm and tells Sandy, who drags him into confronting it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Beast King Rampage
programme.desc: The Rangers are given access to a powerful new Zord, but Evox has designs to steal it for himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Weenies Allowed/ Squilliam Returns
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Double Trouble
programme.desc: O.O.P.S.I., the new artificial intelligence running the Park, goes dangerously off the rails, while a thief posing as an intern steals two eggs that contain a new species of dinosaur inside.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Incredible Shrinking Sponge/ Sportz?
programme.desc: SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself. Squidward invents a new sport to get back at SpongeBob and Patrick for annoying him.

programme.title: Movie: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria attempt to leave Madagascar but wind up landing in Africa. Alex meets his family but struggles to communicate with them due to his easy life in the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Good Krabby Name/ Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick advertise the Krusty Krab. Then, petitions are circulated to see which restaurant will get bulldozed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Arrgh!/ Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Bob and Pat convince Mr. Krabs to play Treasure Hunt; Bob hops on the wrong bus.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Doodle Dimension/ Moving Bubble Bass
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become trapped in an alternate dimension where anything they draw comes to life. SpongeBob and Patrick help Bubble Bass move out of his mother's basement.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Broken Alarm/ Karen's Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his alarm clock and nothing else is loud enough to wake him up. And, Karen learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.desc: SpongeBob's new friend is a giant fluffy hamster. There's one problem, though: no one else can see him. Patrick wants to be a horse.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.desc: When Verna is hospitalized, the hospital refuses to let her return home unless it's cleaned up. Joanne's house has gone from immaculate showplace to garbage pit.

programme.desc: Dee blew a $150,000 legal settlement to fulfill her hoarding obsession. Jan admits she's been living in filth for years. She hasn't taken the trash out since 2006 and goes months without showering.

programme.title: Hoarders: Linda
programme.desc: Linda hadn't allowed her family into her home for years. A recent medical emergency exposed the secret she'd been hiding. What her daughter found in her home shocked her and made her question her mother's sanity.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: Firefighter's Ball (Part Two)
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 6
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Full Mental Jacket

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Alliance
programme.desc: Find out which Joker is an avid photographer, and what words the guys never want to hear before filming a punishment. Plus, learn which Joker is never afraid to strip down for a challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Enter the Dragons

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sorry for Your Loss

programme.title: Sex and the City: Don't Ask, Don't Tell
programme.desc: On the eve of her wedding, Charlotte admits that she and Trey have not slept together.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Escape From New York
programme.desc: While visiting L.A., Samantha meets a model and Carrie meets Matthew McConaughey.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Sex and Another City
programme.desc: While in Los Angeles, the girls head to the Playboy Mansion for a pool party.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Hot Child in the City
programme.desc: Charlotte tackles Trey's problem, while Samantha throws a party for a mature 13-year-old.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Frenemies
programme.desc: Miranda is shocked to learn that her date has died; Carrie teaches a seminar.

programme.title: Sex and the City: What Goes Around Comes Around
programme.desc: Carrie apologizes to Natasha, and Charlotte encounters a gardener at the McDougal estate.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Cock a Doodle Do!
programme.desc: When Big invites Carrie to lunch, she ignores Miranda's advice and accepts his invitation.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Agony and the Ex-Tacy
programme.desc: Carrie is left alone at a restaurant on her birthday and ponders the idea of soulmates.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Real Me
programme.desc: Carrie is asked to join a fashion show that features both models and 'real people.'

programme.title: Sex and the City: Defining Moments
programme.desc: Carrie meets a jazzman to help her get over Big; Samantha crosses some boundaries.

programme.title: Sex and the City: What's Sex Got to Do With It?
programme.desc: Samantha actually begins to date someone that she likes; Miranda opts for celibacy.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Ghost Town
programme.desc: Charlotte's battle with her mother-in-law explodes; Samantha's relationship gets a boost.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Baby, Talk Is Cheap
programme.desc: Carrie is still crazy about Aidan and wants him back; Charlotte rethinks her baby plans.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Time and Punishment
programme.desc: Carrie frets about Aidan's ability to forgive her affair; Miranda discovers leisure.

programme.title: Sex and the City: My Motherboard, Myself
programme.desc: Carrie and Aidan exchange keys; Miranda strains to maintain her strong woman image.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Sex and the Country
programme.desc: Samantha joins Carrie at Aidan's cottage in the country where she meets a cute farmer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Belles of the Balls
programme.desc: Carrie helps Aidan and Big learn to accept each other, while Miranda and Steve get closer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Coulda, Woulda, Shoulda
programme.desc: Miranda reveals that she's pregnant, and after much deliberation, she decides to have the baby. Meanwhile, Samantha uses her connection as a representative for Lucy Liu to her advantage so she can nab a great handbag.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous when Aidan suggests that they move in together. To make matters worse, she finds an engagement ring among his things and questions whether he is 'the one.' Miranda and Steve decide to raise the baby together, while living separately.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Carrie befriends a gay guy but she soon realizes that she has to fight for his attention when they go out together. While under the influence of ecstasy, Samantha confesses to Richard that she loves him. Miranda's co-worker tells everyone she is pregnant.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Change of a Dress
programme.desc: When Carrie tells Aidan she wants to take things slower, he refuses to give her time and moves out of their apartment the following day. Meanwhile, the monogamy bug bites Samantha when she finds out Richard is sleeping with other women.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Ring a Ding Ding
programme.desc: Carrie has a serious financial problem; Miranda and Steve grapple with raising a baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: A Vogue Idea
programme.desc: Carrie begins her new job at Vogue; Charlotte hosts Miranda's baby shower.

programme.title: Sex and the City: I Heart NY
programme.desc: Carrie becomes nostalgic about her relationship with Mr. Big and the city she loves.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Anchors Away
programme.desc: The girls try to come to terms with Miranda's new life with Brady; Carrie meets a sailor.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Unoriginal Sin
programme.desc: Samantha gets back together with Richard; Carrie has a dry spell in her love life.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Luck Be an Old Lady
programme.desc: The girls head to Atlantic City for a 'girls' weekend; Samantha can't trust Richard.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Cover Girl
programme.desc: Samantha offers to help Carrie with her book cover; Charlotte shops on-line.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Plus One Is the Loneliest Number
programme.desc: Samantha organizes Carrie's book-launch party; Miranda doesn't tell her date about Brady.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Carrie obsesses over a comment made about Aidan; Samantha baby-sits Brady.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Big Journey
programme.desc: Hoping to see Big, Carrie travels to a book reading in San Francisco with Samantha.

programme.title: Sex and the City: I Love a Charade
programme.desc: The girls head to the Hamptons for the memorable wedding of a supposedly gay singer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: To Market, to Market
programme.desc: Carrie calms her nerves over a first date with a fellow author by going on another date.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Great Sexpectations
programme.desc: Carrie is disappointed by Jack's lacklustre performance between the sheets.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Perfect Present
programme.desc: Carrie spends a sleepless night at Berger's apartment; Samantha meets her waiter again.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Pick a Little, Talk a Little
programme.desc: Berger reacts poorly to Carrie's criticism; Charlotte and Harry have an argument.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Lights, Camera, Relationship
programme.desc: Carrie's success makes Berger uncomfortable; Samantha adds buzz for Smith's play.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Hop, Skip and a Week
programme.desc: Charlotte is set up by matchmakers at her synagogue; Carrie and Berger take a break.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Post-It Always Sticks Twice
programme.desc: The girls have a night out to help Carrie recover from Berger's break-up message.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Catch
programme.desc: Charlotte and Harry's wedding day arrives and is filled with unexpected mishaps.

programme.title: Sex and the City: A Woman's Right to Shoes
programme.desc: Carrie's expensive new shoes go missing when she attends a friend's baby shower.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Boy, Interrupted
programme.desc: Carrie reunites with her high school boyfriend; Samantha sneaks into an exclusive club.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Domino Effect
programme.desc: Big returns to New York for surgery; Miranda introduces Steve to her new love interest.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The One
programme.desc: Carrie is pursued by a famed Russian artist while Miranda admits her feelings to Steve.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Let There Be Light
programme.desc: A relationship heats up between Carrie and Petrovsky; Samantha encounters her ex.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Ick Factor
programme.desc: Steve and Miranda decide to get married; Samantha discovers a lump in her breast.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Catch-38
programme.desc: Samantha tries to get a doctor's appointment; Miranda and Steve go on their honeymoon.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: America's Next Chefs
programme.desc: Guy Fieri puts four up-and-coming chefs to the ultimate Flavortown test to crown America's Next Chef. First, Guy has the chefs flip the ingredients from an old-fashioned Waldorf salad into a modern dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Filling Up on Philly
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is filling up on a taste of Philadelphia. There's a funky malt house serving Buffalo wings and a Polish twist on the cheesesteak. Plus, a long time tavern making real deal Italian recipes and a stop for Indonesian specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Goes Hawaiian
programme.desc: Guy checks out the hot spots in Hawaii for food and visits an authentic luau.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: What's for Breakfast?
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out breakfast places such as a juice bar making bagels from scratch, and a roadhouse mixing Philly food with Southwestern favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Where the Locals Eat
programme.desc: Guy Fieri discovers some great local favourites in Memphis, Virginia and Omaha.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Gone Global
programme.desc: Guy tries a Venezuelan sandwich loaded with shredded beef, black beans, and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Local Flavor
programme.desc: Guy visits an 85-year old Seattle joint for secret family chili, and a 100-year old California bar-turned-restaurant for crab cioppino and artichoke soup.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Steaks and Chops
programme.desc: Guy looks at burgers and steaks in San Francisco and Cambridge.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Focused
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Syracuse and Nags Head that have a definite direction.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Viewer's Choice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes to some great places viewers have suggested: a sixty-year-old legacy in Florida where even the fish goes in the smoker, a Hawaiian paradise outside of Seattle, serving up authentic island food that has mainlanders hooked.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Spinning the Globe
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's checking out joints putting their own spin on global flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a culinary dojo ampin' up local specialties like saimin and chile pepper chicken. An outrageous twist on tacos and burritos in Kansas City, Mo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Goes Tailgatin'
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits a Raiders home game for tailgating with chefs from three local joints. They're bringing the kitchen to the blacktop and cranking out chicken and waffles, double chili cheeseburgers and steak sandwiches with jalapeno pesto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coast to Coast Chow
programme.desc: Guy's quest is covering the country. In Charleston, S.C., a breakfast hangout does a chicken-fried biscuit and a shrimp BLT. In Chicago, a 40-year-old institution is busting out traditional German specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' the Extra Mile
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headin' to some joints going all-in on some classic comfort foods. In Chicago, the burger joint with Asian flare proudly serves all things umami. In Memphis, a high-end chef takes low-down Southern staples to a whole new level.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eurocentric
programme.desc: Guy feasts on the many tastes of Europe in places across the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamic Duos
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out the combos that make some local hangouts a hit. In Denver, the double-duty corner bar smoking pork for its biscuits and topping pizzas with the bounty of the county.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Servin' Up San Francisco
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's cruising the San Francisco coast for a diverse culinary road trip. First, Guy swings by the repurposed garage in the Mission District for some southern hospitality.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Authentic Eats
programme.desc: Guy finds real deal authentic eats in St. Louis and Syracuse.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Aces of Authenticity
programme.desc: Guy hits up some joints that are authentic to the bone. In Santa Fe, N.M., a farm-raised Chimayan owner turns out traditional dishes like blue corn enchiladas with red chilli sauce.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Things New York
programme.desc: Guy's gets a taste of New York in and out of the Big Apple, including Eureka, California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Little Bit of Everywhere
programme.desc: Guy samples international cuisine found across America.

programme.title: Giada on the Beach: Italian Surf 'n' Turf
programme.desc: Giada and her weekend guests cook up a seasonal feast made almost entirely on the outdoor grill. Dishes include grilled plum salad, spicy melon salad, grilled skirt steak with smoky herb sauce, and grilled halibut.

programme.title: Giada on the Beach: Sunset Aperitivo
programme.desc: After a fun day on the beach, nothing hits the spot quite like a cool, breezy cocktail and lots of delicious bites. Giada De Laurentiis does summer sunset right with an Italian happy hour and appetizer spread.

programme.title: Giada on the Beach: Pool Party!
programme.desc: Giada and her daughter, Jade, are hosting Jade's friends for the weekend. Giada sets up a pool party with the perfect outdoor menu.

programme.title: Giada on the Beach: Clam Bake
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis puts a West Coast spin on an East Coast tradition with an ultimate Italian clam bake dinner on the beach for her family. She also makes summer succotash and grilled seafood salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 11
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks super easy eats with her kids, starting with a fabulous foursome of wafflewiches: turkey bacon, reuben, roast beef and fluffernutter. Then she makes homemade ravioli and a blackberry icebox cake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Alex's Birthday
programme.desc: Alex is turning 15 and the Drummonds are celebrating with Iny's prune cake with buttermilk icing for birthday breakfast after an early morning in the saddle.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fill The Freezer
programme.desc: Ree's filling up the freezer with family favourites that are great standbys.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Beat the Clock
programme.desc: Ree has to fix a super fast meal from what she has on-hand, so she makes patty melts.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Outdoor Movie Night
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes some of her favorite munchies for an outdoor movie night on the farm. Her Nachos are piled high with BBQ Pulled Pork, and Radishes with Smoked Butter are a unique, crunchy combination. She assembles individual Candy Bar Salads for dessert.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: All Day Grilling
programme.desc: On a prior visit to California, Valerie Bertinelli's friends showed her how to grill breakfast, which started a fierce competition to see who could come up with the best all-day grill menu. Today, Valerie is turning up the heat with grilled French toast.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Sweet and Spicy
programme.desc: Guy Fieri doesn't love candy, so when his chef friends visit the ranch for Halloween, they know to mix heat with the sweet. Amanda Freitag starts off the meal with a red hot-blood orange margarita made with spicy cinnamon syrup.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Parm and Polenta Cake Make Everything Better
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his grilled eggplant parmesan outdoors on the grill and whips up a classic accompaniment with salami and provolone, antipasti salad with campfire dressing.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Kitchen Lessons
programme.desc: The hosts share easy recipes that the whole family can make. Jeff and his son cook up the Mauro family's bacon and pineapple pan pizza. Then, Geoffrey and Katie Lee make GZ's savory parmesan popcorn and Katie's peanut butter popcorn treat.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Express Lane Extreme: Name Your Number
programme.desc: Guy Fieri unveils the ultimate strategy game in which the four competing chefs must decide whether to use six, eight or ten ingredients before knowing what kind of dish they're making.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: World Fusion
programme.desc: Guy brings in chefs representing cuisines from all around the world to team up and fuse their cultures' flavours together. The teams create their best spicy dish to see which combination of cultures is the tastiest.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Redemption Tournament: Part 1
programme.desc: Four previously eliminated chefs are back for another shot at victory.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Where Exactly on the Globe is Carl Sanpedro?
programme.desc: The Titans end up in San Pedro and learn about the infamous villain Carl Sanpedro and vow to stop him, no matter where he goes.

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: #LeagueOfShadows
programme.desc: Diana, Kara, and Barbara do more than save citizens from Super-Villains.

programme.title: Movie: Teen Titans Go! vs. Teen Titans
programme.desc: The 2013 team is forced to work together with their 2003 counterparts when villains from both worlds attempt to pit them against each other.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super: Where Does the Dream Pick Up? Find the Super Saiyan God!
programme.desc: Knowing Goku, the Supreme Kais tell King Kai not to let him find out about Beerus; spoiler alert: he finds out about Beerus. Meanwhile, Bulma plans an epic birthday bash on a giant cruise ship, Vegeta might even show up.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super: Bid for the Dragon Balls! Pilaf and Crew's Impossible Mission!
programme.desc: Have you missed the great Emperor Pilaf, Mai, and Shu? Turns out, they're poor and starving! Luckily, Bulma's massive birthday boat is nearby, and the prize she has planned for Bingo is just what they've been looking for.

programme.title: American Dad!: Jenny Fromdabloc
programme.desc: After Snot professes his love for Hayley and gets shot down, Steve and Roger devise a plan to cheer him up. Roger dresses up as Steve's cousin from New Jersey, Jenny Fromdabloc, and Snot falls hard for her.

programme.title: American Dad!: Home Wrecker
programme.desc: Stan and Francine fight over how to redecorate the house. The argument goes so far, that they split the house down the middle and try to live without each other.

programme.title: American Dad!: Flirting With Disaster
programme.desc: Francine gets a job at Stan's office, which cramps Stan's style and his ability to flirt with co-workers.

programme.title: Rick and Morty: Meeseeks and Destroy
programme.desc: Rick provides the family with a solution to their problems, freeing him up to go on an adventure led by Morty. Sounds good, better record this one, broh.

programme.title: Family Guy: Brian Goes Back to College
programme.desc: After writing a story for a local magazine, Brian lands a job with the New Yorker. However, his college dropout status haunts him so he decides to go back to university to get his degree.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Courtship of Stewie's Father
programme.desc: When Stewie intensifies his efforts to kill Lois, she thinks he is acting out and orders Peter to spend more time with him. They begin to do some bonding until a theme park outing ends disastrously.

programme.title: Movie: Batman: Gotham Knight
programme.desc: Batman cleanses the streets of Gotham City, striking fear into the hearts of criminals.

programme.title: Movie: Batman: The Dark Knight Returns, Part 2
programme.desc: The Batman has returned after a 10-year absence. The Gotham authorities want to arrest him. An old foe wants a reunion. The Feds want the Man of Tomorrow to put a stop to him.

programme.title: Gemusetto Machu Picchu: Chapter 2A: Second Set
programme.desc: Makasu defeats religious pantheons in sports and steals their mystical artifacts.

programme.title: The Boondocks: The Itis
programme.desc: Granddad opens a soul food restaurant that is decorated with beds based on the idea that the hearty food makes people sleepy. However, this has a disastrous effect on the town.

programme.title: The Venture Brothers: The Invisible Hand Of Fate
programme.desc: The Venture Bros. peels away the onion-like shrouds of time.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Shows You Iron
programme.desc: In which Joe Pera, a middle school choir teacher, presents to viewers the importance of Northern Michigan geology, especially iron. Also, copper, azurite, tourmaline, and Lake Superior agate.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Takes You to Breakfast
programme.desc: In which Joe Pera takes viewers for Saturday morning breakfast at his favorite family restaurant.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Takes You on a Fall Drive
programme.desc: In which Joe Pera takes viewers along on his 'Fall Loop,' the drive he does every year on the Saturday following Halloween.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Shows You How to Dance
programme.desc: In which Joe Pera attempts to show viewers how to properly dance by yourself at a co-worker’s wedding.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Strength of a Grown Man
programme.desc: Needing a hero with shrinking powers, but forgetting about Bumblebee, Robin invites The Atom to join their fight against the Brain.

programme.desc: When Alan and Judith argue during a rehearsal for Jake's play, Charlie is stuck handling a roomful of fourth graders by himself. Charlie then uses his jingle-writing experience to craft the play -- with an interesting outcome.

programme.desc: Charlie tries to win back a former flame by hosting a large Thanksgiving dinner with his family.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Frontier Chiropractor

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Camel Filters and Pheremones
programme.desc: Jake develops a crush on Berta's gorgeous granddaughter, Prudence. Meanwhile, Rose's dream comes true when Charlie pretends that Rose is his girlfriend in order to fend off the flirtatious 16-year-old.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sarah Like Puny Alan
programme.desc: In order to secure a date, Charlie volunteers a flu-ridden Alan to escort the woman's sister and tries desperately to speed up the recovery. But when Charlie is the one who gets ill before the date, their roles get reversed.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Can't Afford Hyenas
programme.desc: Charlie discovers that his accountant is inept and his debts are all overdue. While Alan convinces Charlie to cut his spending, Charlie teaches Jake about sports gambling.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Round One to the Hot Crazy Chick
programme.desc: Charlie is intrigued when he and Alan find a sexy, but seemingly crazy, woman hitting a car with a baseball bat.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Was Saliva, Alan
programme.desc: Frankie is forced to explain why she is in hiding with her eight-year-old daughter, Joanie. While both brothers are interested, only one of them manages to win her heart. Meanwhile, Jake is disinterested in Joanie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ate the Hamburgers, Wearing the Hats
programme.desc: Alan offends Charlie by selecting their crazy cousins as Jake's legal guardians in case of emergency. When Jake suffers an injury, Charlie races to prove he can be a responsible guardian.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: An Old Flame With a New Wick
programme.desc: Charlie agrees to meet with a former girlfriend who broke his heart, but he is in for a surprise when he discovers that she is now a man named Bill. After managing to overcome his shock, Charlie's new friendship is jeopardized when Bill dates Evelyn.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Remember the Coatroom, I Just Don't Remember You
programme.desc: Judith's sister, Liz, hits on Alan at Jake's party despite having a history with Charlie. Meanwhile, Evelyn celebrates Jake's birthday in her own way.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hey, I Can Pee Outside in the Dark
programme.desc: Jake continuously plays 'Smoke on the Water' on his guitar and has developed a grumpy attitude. Alan tries a father/son chat, Charlie offers a jam session and Berta thinks Jake is just constipated.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: No Sniffing, No Wowing
programme.desc: Alan takes Charlie to meet with his divorce attorney, Laura, after Judith expresses concern that Charlie is a bad influence on Jake. Laura is open to Charlie's other relationships, but takes advantage of her request that he be available at any time.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Doctor Has a Cow Puppet
programme.desc: Alan finally succumbs to Judith's demand that he take Jake to therapy and realizes he has been sleepwalking. After Evelyn tells Charlie that Alan used to sleepwalk as a child, Charlie believes he has a solution.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Thanks, Man
programme.desc: When Carrie decides to host Thanksgiving, an unexpected visitor disrupts the festivities.

programme.desc: Doug and Carrie try to weasel money out of Arthur so they can indulge themselves.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Answer Is Maybe
programme.desc: Richard tells Christine that the reason he has good luck with women is that he 'says yes to life.' When Christine meets a good-looking man after paying a visit to New Christine, she breaks out of her mold and says yes when he asks her out to dinner.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Come to Papa Jeff
programme.desc: When Christine's parents can't make it to Grandparent's Day at Ritchie's school, New Christine suggests that Jeff, the new man in Christine's life, go as Ritchie's special friend. Christine then learns that Jeff really is a grandfather.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Oh God, Yes
programme.desc: Ritchie returns from a church festival with Richard and new Christine with a newfound interest in religion. Christine, who once had a bad experience at church, re-examines her beliefs and with Ritchie and Matthew in tow, decides to give God another go.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Barb moves in with Christine after announcing that she and Pete plan to divorce. Meanwhile, when Barb moves in, Matthew relocates to Ritchie's room where he discovers his nephew's strange sleep habits.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Champ
programme.desc: When 'meanie moms' Marly and Lindsay guilt Christine into serving hot lunch at Ritchie's school, she finds herself serving with Stan and vows not to sleep with him again. Meanwhile, she and Matthew decide they must take control of their dating lives.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Playdate With Destiny
programme.desc: Christine's crush on Mr. Harris makes her lose her composure around him at Ritchie's school's fundraising gala. When Ritchie wins the raffle prize of a playdate with him, Christine is thrilled, until Richard's father-son plans threaten to spoil the fun.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Women 'N Tuition

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Annoyed that Ritchie finds his weekends with his dad more fun than his weekdays with her, Christine decides to make Richard responsible for having Ritchie complete his big homework assignment.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: What About Barb?
programme.desc: When Barb starts working at Christine's gym, which she recently bought into, Christine can't accept the reality of not being in complete control. Meanwhile, Matthew helps Ritchie find the perfect nanny to replace him when he starts medical school.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Crash
programme.desc: When Christine's environmentally friendly hybrid car and Marly's gas-guzzling monster SUV hit one another, it becomes a bigger dispute than simply who hit whom. While her car is in the shop, Christine has to rent an SUV when no other car is available.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Brother's Return
programme.desc: Country Matt returns to help his brother, a new parolee, overcome his fear of dogs. Earl and Tia's daughter-in-law race to save a stray running loose in scorching temperatures. A couple of empty nesters visit VRC in search of a new friend.

programme.desc: Tania races to rescue a mama dog clinging to life after being in labour for two days. A young woman comes to Villalobos looking for a roommate to share her new home with.

programme.desc: Tia recounts Villalobos' most memorable miracle rescues. From Hilda, the therapy pooch who survived the streets of New Orleans, to Curtis, a dog that suffered a gunshot wound and is now recovered and thriving in his forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Last Chance Rescue
programme.desc: Tia races to rescue four dogs from a rural shelter in Louisiana from euthanasia. Mariah and Toney give a scared, shy dog a shot at a forever home, while a unique canine gets a chance at a Pennsylvania prison dog program.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Playing Match Maker
programme.desc: Spotty chocolate poison dart frog Hunter arrives and battles for the title of top male of the colony. Zookeepers hope for a new joey when they discover Dusky pademelon Styx's new appearance, while Sulawesi macaque Maggie welcomes her first baby.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Rescued From War
programme.desc: Tia takes in a pit bull that was rescued from terrible conditions in Kuwait. An adopter travels from Michigan in hopes of finding a new best friend. When a stray dog ends up at Villalobos, Earl is determined to track down its owner.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Last Chance Rescue
programme.desc: Tia races to rescue four dogs from a rural shelter in Louisiana from euthanasia. Mariah and Toney give a scared, shy dog a shot at a forever home, while a unique canine gets a chance at a Pennsylvania prison dog program.

programme.desc: Tia recounts Villalobos' most memorable miracle rescues. From Hilda, the therapy pooch who survived the streets of New Orleans, to Curtis, a dog that suffered a gunshot wound and is now recovered and thriving in his forever home.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Chimp Turf War
programme.desc: A power struggle unfolds on chimp island as dominant male Dylan is challenged by young pretender Carlos.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Freedom Fighters
programme.desc: After Tia receives an anonymous tip, she and her team find themselves in a dangerous situation as they attempt to rescue dogs that may be involved in a dog-fighting ring.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Making Miracles

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Mariah is devastated when she learns that a friend has passed away.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Gun Country
programme.desc: One team of wardens investigate the shooting of a turkey hunter that could be an attempted homicide while another team sets up a stakeout.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Manhunt
programme.desc: Officer Glen Lucas races to the scene of an ATV accident. When a home is broken into, Officers Bill Boudreau and Eric Hannett assist police in tracking the suspect. Officer Bob Mancini tries to save the life of an injured loon.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Buck Fever
programme.desc: In the final week of Maine's deer season, some hunters are desperate to bag a buck. Warden Robertson confronts a felon with an illegal gun and a pile of bait. Warden Carter investigates teen hunters terrorizing a neighborhood.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Excuses, Excuses
programme.desc: Hunting season heats up as Warden Herring calls in the air wing to track illegal activity on a game preserve. Warden Blanchard catches an intentional violator red-handed. Wardens Carter and McBrine execute a search warrant on a known poacher.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Lt. Bill Boudreau investigates a complaint about a man illegally feeding bears. Officer Jon Demler pulls over a swerving car, only to find himself in the middle of a domestic dispute. The dive team searches for a man who may have drowned in Kingston.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Up north, Sgt. Lucas checks duck hunters. Down south, Officer Benvenuti and Trainee Crouse question a man suspected of hunting over bait. Later, Sgt. Lucas and Officer Holmes attempt to free a cub stuck inside a trap before its mother returns.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne get more than they bargained for with a speeding snowmobiler. The K-9 unit performs winter training. Officer MacFadzen patrols an ice drag racing event. Then, Officer Cyrs heads into the woods to investigate a hit and run.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau teams up with trainee Masucci to track down a turkey hunter who may have shot from the road. When an animal release goes south, Officer Hannett lends a hand. Then, Officer Canfield races to catch a trespassing dirt biker.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wet and Wild
programme.desc: A hot summer weekend in Texas keeps wardens busy on the water. A festival attracts thousands of people to float the San Marcos River. Patrol on Lake Texoma leads to multiple arrests. A fisherman is questioned when he can't provide identification.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trespassers Beware
programme.desc: In Texas, a new year brings new cadets and a rookie almost gets run down. In Beaumont, Game Warden Boone investigates an armed trespasser. Game Wardens encounter a Mexican boat on U.S. waters while looking for illegal gill nets on the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks and Bows
programme.desc: A hunter is confronted for killing a deer with a gun in bowhunting only season. A man is questioned for being in possession of venomous copperhead snakes. While checking bowhunters at night, a game warden helps find an injured hunter.

programme.desc: New evidence might finally identify the hiding place of Hitler's billion-dollar gold train. A discovery of a long-lost settlement rewrites the history of the Vikings in North America. A blood-red river in Siberia points to catastrophic pollution.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Swastika Conspiracy
programme.desc: A sinister giant swastika appears in a forest in Germany. A strange pattern is etched into the desert near the famous Nazca lines, but archaeologists don't know who put it there. Mysterious markings are spotted in an isolated corner of Antarctica.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden Cities of the Maya
programme.desc: A young boy makes international headlines when he uses satellite images to discover lost cities of the Maya. Satellite images might point to a modern-day genocide. Trees in China seem to be spelling out a sinister message.

programme.desc: New evidence might finally identify the hiding place of Hitler's billion-dollar gold train. A discovery of a long-lost settlement rewrites the history of the Vikings in North America. A blood-red river in Siberia points to catastrophic pollution.

programme.title: Betrayed: Bent on Betrayal

programme.title: The Genetic Detective: The Hot Case
programme.desc: CeCe Moore helps detectives in Utah with a case, the rape of a 79-year-old woman, that happened three weeks prior.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What If
programme.desc: 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, newly pregnant, has vanished while visiting her on-again-off-again boyfriend. Her mother's desperate search leads to a disturbing connection with another mother miles away.

programme.title: Kansas Cult Killer
programme.desc: When tragic events strike a small Kansas community over and over again, a cunning detective wants to know if they are just a series of horrible coincidences, or something more sinister.

programme.title: The Genetic Detective: The Hot Case
programme.desc: CeCe Moore helps detectives in Utah with a case, the rape of a 79-year-old woman, that happened three weeks prior.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Would You Kill for Love
programme.desc: Jens Soering confessed he murdered his girlfriend's parents. But did he act alone? Was he swayed by devotion to the woman he loved? Or was he so bewitched he confessed to a crime he didn't commit? 30 years later he's hoping new evidence will set him free.

programme.title: Betrayed: Bent on Betrayal
programme.desc: Joan Bent is an 80's working girl. She manages a cleaning staff at a local hotel, and has a loving husband at home. But it can be tough having it all - especially when that includes an enemy with murderous intent in your inner circle.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Buried Deep
programme.desc: 23-year-old Sherry Leighty disappears from Altoona, PA, leaving her three small children behind. After a 13 year search her sister discovers the rumor she skipped town with a new boyfriend is a lie and people close to Sherry have been hiding a secret.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Silver Peak's Secret
programme.desc: Charlie Kinkel goes missing in a remote Nevada mining town. His wife Trayce investigates but is shunned by locals. When a body is discovered, detectives break down the silence to reveal Charlie's murder was a tragic case of misplaced suspicion.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: High School Reunion
programme.desc: When single mother of two Latasha Edwards bumps into her old schoolmate Dammon, she thinks she's met her soul mate. But his charm hides a possessive, violent man. After they separate, Dammon's obsession deepens and Latasha fights to protect her family.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Just a Wall Away
programme.desc: When writer Amy Neisis finds her dream apartment everything is set for a bright future. It's within her budget and she moves quickly to secure a sale. But four nights after moving a terrifying scream makes her realise she got more than she bargained for.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: A Dangerous Mind
programme.desc: When maternal senior psychiatric nurse Maria Jordan fires erratic, heroin-addicted junior nurse Denis Czajkowski, it triggers an all-consuming obsession with Maria that culminates in him holding her hostage for an unimaginably bloody 48 hours.

programme.title: The Lost Women of NXIVM
programme.desc: The story of four women who were part of the NXIVM sex-cult, these women later ended up dying, or vanishing without a trace.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Something's Not Right
programme.desc: When a popular cheerleader goes missing in rural Arkansas, the small town is sent into a panic. After her sports car is found abandoned, investigators are sure something is not right, but no one expects the horror that ensues.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Cowboys From Hell
programme.desc: When Diana Algar and Jose Molina are found brutally murdered in rural Hollenback Township, Pennsylvania, three letters scrawled across Algar's living room wall become the central clue in a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: A Place She'd Call Home
programme.desc: Police are baffled when Melissa White is found murdered in the backyard of her Viola, Illinois home. But when investigators take a closer look at Melissa's neighbors, they unearth a secret. Could this be the key to apprehending Melissa's murderer?

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Night Stalker Attacks
programme.desc: When Cindy Borton is found brutally stabbed to death in her home, authorities immediately suspect those closest to her. But a note left at the site of a local arson lights a trail that turns the investigation on its head.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mom Makes Four
programme.desc: When Carla Fuqua vanishes after a night out with friends, her family panics. She's a dedicated mother who would never leave her son behind. Even worse, Carla has become the fourth missing person in a town of less than 5,000.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Won't Tell Us Why
programme.desc: Richard and Ryan Girgis knew their father, Magdi Girgis, was a cheapskate, prone to violence, and not a particularly good father. But when their family was torn apart, neither wanted to admit deep down that they knew who was behind it.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Roy DeMeo
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: The story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits

programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Castro and the Cold Cream
programme.desc: The true story of how the CIA turned Fidel Castro's lover into a deadly assassin and sent her on a mission to kill their formidable enemy.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber

programme.title: David's Great Big Christmas

programme.title: House to Home by Valerie: Holiday Edition

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Pool-a-Vida
programme.desc: The crew heads to Plantation, Florida to bring Costa Rica to a young family's home. Lucas builds the ultimate jungle backyard that includes a beach volleyball court, a huge swim-in grotto and a spa complete with a giant water wall and a rain curtain.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Tropical Twists
programme.desc: There's nothing like kicking back in the tropics.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Passport to Greenville
programme.desc: A couple fell in love with the stunning views of Greenville Junction, Maine, but the cabin they purchased is in need of some serious work to make it livable year-round for their extended family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: City Girl Meets Country Tiny
programme.desc: A career cheerleader wants a rustic-chic country tiny home that can be her escape. This tiny house includes a main floor master bedroom. It is placed on a farm with horses, a zip line and other adventures just steps away from the front door.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Competitive Construction
programme.desc: A competitive couple tries to turn each renovation project into a game to determine which one of them is the best flipper. The young duo soon realizes that construction is not all fun and games and they've got to get serious to get this flip done.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flipping Down the Aisle
programme.desc: Tom and his fiancée Kerry are planning their upcoming wedding while flipping their first house. They may have bitten off more than they can chew. Stress gets the best of these flippers when they realize that they're rapidly running out of money.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Stressful St. Paul Flip
programme.desc: A husband and wife buy their neighbor's house to beautify their neighborhood and venture into flipping while staying close to home. Differing work methods lead to stress that threatens to get the best of these flippers.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Cabinet Catastrophe
programme.desc: Newlyweds Tori and Lee decide to flip a huge house in Denver, but they quickly realize they're in over their heads. Each project becomes more complicated than the last. With the budget snowballing, they question if they can finish the project.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: The Nails 'n the Coughin'
programme.desc: Lifelong friends set out to flip their first house together in their hometown of Overland, Missouri. While one has past experience renovating houses, the other is a total newbie.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: From Tune-Up to Teardown
programme.desc: A young couple believes they have scored the deal of a lifetime when they acquire an old farmhouse for their first flip. They soon realize, however, that the house is beyond repair. They're left to rebuild from the ground up, risking everything they have.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flooring Flip Out
programme.desc: A couple in Rockwall, TX, finds themselves in deep water, literally, with their first flip -- but a mysterious leak in the front yard is only the beginning of their problems.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Live and Learn ... or Sellout
programme.desc: Homeowners use their own skills to turn a disaster house into a high-dollar flip.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Big Wow on Alabama's Lake Wedowee
programme.desc: After spending years renting on Lake Wedowee in Alabama, Chris and Jenny are ready to purchase a vacation home for their family. A local agent helps the couple land a charming lakefront property, but it's in need of major improvements.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big Reno With Astounding Views on Apple Valley Lake in Ohio
programme.desc: A couple customizes an Ohio lakefront home for their large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: I Pie: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads this episode on lemon meringue pie with a new crust, a new filling and a new meringue. He also bites the heads off of some puppets.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fry Hard II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' his classic fried chicken episode with an all-new deep-fried recipe, an introduction to sumac and a look at the science of crunch.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Big Island

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portugal

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Lima

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Seattle

programme.title: Man v. Food: Milwaukee, WI

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ

programme.desc: Lincoln invites Clyde to a sleepover, but gets jealous when Clyde wants to hang out with his sisters. After eavesdropping on his parents, Lincoln thinks they have decided to get rid of their kids.

programme.title: The Loud House: Baby Steps/ Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: When Clyde thinks his parents are having another baby he goes to Lincoln for help on how to be a great big brother. When Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, a fight breaks out leading to Defcon five in the Loud house.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Away Game/ Monster Cash
programme.desc: Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their dad's new apartment permanently. Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of 'El Cucuy' and learns that this story may not be fiction.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Butterfly Effect/ The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household.

programme.title: The Loud House: Making the Grade/ Vantastic Voyage
programme.desc: When Lincoln's four-year-old sister, Lisa, gets put into his 5th grade class, his social standing is at stake. Sick of their family van always falling apart, the kids decide to try and trick Dad into buying a cool new van.

programme.title: The Loud House: Along Came a Sister/ Chore and Peace
programme.desc: Lincoln causes trouble when he loses the class tarantula during his turn taking care of it. Lincoln declares a strike until he can convince someone to switch chores with him.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Going Overboard/ Walk Don't Run
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne finds out Tio Carlos was a famous skateboarder and gets him to teach her some moves. And, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business to buy a new skateboard.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale of a Birthday/ Karate Island
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wants to give his daughter the best birthday ever. SpongeBob is assigned the task of finding out what she would like; SpongeBob is invited to a karate competition on the mysterious Karate Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Digs/ Krabs a la Mode
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab and turns it into an ice skating rink.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Extreme Sports/ Squirrel Record
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team the Drasticals. Also, Sandy finds a book of world's records and tries to break them all with SpongeBob's help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Stanley S. Squarepants
programme.desc: SpongeBob's klutzy cousin comes to visit and causes havoc.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: One Coarse Meal/ Gary in Love
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs finds out that Plankton's afraid of whales. / Gary falls for a snail named Mary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gramma's Secret Recipe/ The Cent of Money
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Great Patty Caper
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Plankton solve a mystery.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Buried in Time/ Enchanted Tiki Dream
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a dream world for Squidward; The gang is caught in a time capsule.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans/ Hide and Then What Happens?
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play hide n' seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick. Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Annihilation: Earth!
programme.desc: The turtles learn of Kraang's return, and a giant threat to the earth is coming.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Beyond the Known Universe
programme.desc: The Team meets a strange alien robot called the Fugitoid.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Moons of Thalos 3
programme.desc: When the Team crash lands on an ice moon along with the enemy, they must put their differences aside to survive.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Under the Volcano!
programme.desc: Danny dons powerful dino-mech armor to dig up Cap'n No-Beard's treasure beneath Mt. Sibo.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: The Power and the Peril!
programme.desc: Rock star mathematician Ian Malcolm returns to Isla Nublar and helps Claire, Owen and Hudson deal with strange power surges all over Jurassic World.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Music Box/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Theodore gives the Principal a music box he found in Dave's desk to cheer her up. Theodore's been mistakenly mailed off in a box, so Alvin and Simon have to get him back.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Mama Drama/ Ballet Boys
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany learn parenting isn't easy when they have to care for a robot baby for a school assignment.When Alvin's soccer team struggles, the coach makes the team learn ballet to help with their conditioning.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: What a Gem/ Family Spirit
programme.desc: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave to go to the big soccer game.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Missing Miss Smith/ Monster Madness
programme.desc: When Alvin finally pushes Miss Smith too far, she quits and her replacement is a nightmare. Alvin and Simon tease The Chipettes about being scared by a movie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Oh Brother Where Art Thou/ The Wall
programme.desc: Alvin thinks he's losing his mind when Simon goes missing and no one else even remembers who Simon is. When the girls at school cast votes for the cutest chipmunk on the bathroom wall, Alvin worries about the results.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Super Girls/ Held Back
programme.desc: The Chipettes set out to prove to Alvin and the boys that being a superhero isn't only a guy thing.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Great Cactus Con
programme.desc: Jasper gets the chance to take his crush to Cactus Con but when a mysterious villain gets involved in the convention the entire gang is forced into action!

programme.title: Henry Danger: Part 1: A New Evil
programme.desc: Henry's trapped with his family as Captain Man heads out to save the founder of TwitFlash. Charlotte and Schwoz put together a world-changing mystery.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Part 2: A New Darkness
programme.desc: Kid Danger's superpower is stolen, and Henry's house is under attack by goons.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Part 3: A New Hero
programme.desc: Schwoz works on an anti-virus to stop an evil plan as Kid Danger and Captain Man battle a villain.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Exit Stage Theft
programme.desc: Max tries to reestablish his evil cred with petty crimes, but when his best friends become a target, he must choose between his them and his reputation.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Are You Afraid of the Park?
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe start a fight between Billy and Nora so they can avoid riding a scary roller coaster, but the scheme backfires when the feud escalates beyond control.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Evil Never Sleeps
programme.desc: Phoebe's allegiance is torn when she learns her boyfriend's father might plotting a return to evil, and she must decide whether to take him down.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Give Me a Break Up
programme.desc: Phoebe's relationship with her superhero boyfriend is put to the test when he is offered an assignment overseas.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: Pizza in Your Game Face!
programme.desc: Host Jay Pharoah introduces our mystery celebrities hiding behind 3D animated filters, as our panel Darci Lynne Farmer, Gabrielle Nevaeh Green and Lex Lumpkin ask questions, gather clues, and play games to unveil our two special guests.

programme.title: All That
programme.desc: The cast scramble to find the props they need for a sketch, the loud librarian returns to Dullmont Junior High, Beyonce advertises her new store and long coat plans a bank robbery. Daddy Yankee performs.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Roommates 2
programme.desc: Go Go and Honey Lemon quickly clash when they become roommates. Meanwhile, when a thief steals Honey Lemon’s chem-lab purse, it accidentally turns him into a monster.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Mark on Fire
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 1
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 2: Escape From Reality
programme.desc: Dipper, Soos, and Wendy must save Mabel from a strange new world, while Bill's forces plan their next move.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego
programme.desc: Professional mech-wrestler El Fuego is intent on becoming the toughest fighter in San Fransokyo and decides he must beat the strongest challenger he can find, Baymax.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: All Aboard the Snakeybus
programme.desc: Jacksepticeye cruises around Miami in the Snakeybus, Pokimane goes for her first victory in Brawl Stars, and Markiplier takes his son for a wild ride in Guts N Glory.

programme.title: DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs. Genesis!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Bright Lights, Big Changes!
Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here
programme.desc: Hiro is forced to write a story for his class and decides to write a Big Hero 6 story. Meanwhile, strange versions of Noodle Burger Boy attack the team.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Hilinski's Hope
programme.desc: Seven months after the death of Washington State QB Tyler Hilinski, his parents cope with their grief and memories.

programme.title: TrueSouth: New Orleans
programme.desc: From Liuzza's and Mandina's – two Sicilian corner stores that have become neighborhood Creole Italian restaurants – look at how and why some stories get erased while others become defining narratives.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Hodgenville
programme.desc: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, the land where Lincoln was born, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. Onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Memphis
programme.desc: Just as there are many Souths, black Memphis reveals itself to be varied and complex and beautiful. Here, we see the streets of Memphis and its classic spots including Pop's Hot Tamales, Lee Crumb and Ms. Girlee's.

programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.
